HGSS.593.0000:
Why? It’s not fair!
Why are there only shots of Pokémon?\f
Why aren’t there any shots of ladies?
I call discrimination!
HGSS.593.0001:
Climbing the mountain to enjoy
its great view is one thing...\f
But sneaking a peek at other people’s
PC Boxes fills me with a guilty glee.
HGSS.593.0002:
Did you know?
About my PC Box, I mean.\f
It’s full of Pokémon everyone longs
for, like...\f
...No, it would be immodest for me to
say. It would sound like bragging.\f
If you really must know, you can always
find out yourself.
HGSS.593.0003:
I visit every day to check on other
people’s Dress-Up Data.\f
For me, it’s like the first step to
fashion!
HGSS.593.0004:
Oh, dear me! Gracious!
This is almost scandalous!
HGSS.593.0005:
For combinations of Pokémon and
Accessories, you can get ideas from\r
others by observing what they do.
HGSS.593.0006:
The same kind of Accessory can create
entirely different impressions.\f
It really depends on where and how
it’s used.
HGSS.593.0007:
I won a Backdrop drawing for
Accessories in the Goldenrod Tunnel.
HGSS.593.0008:
What I like to do...\f
I like sneaking glances at the people
checking out Dress-Up Data.
HGSS.593.0009:
Warps to the GTS and the Trainer
Rankings on 1F.
HGSS.593.0010: Warps to the Battle Video Gallery on 3F.
HGSS.593.0011:
Connect to Nintendo Wi-Fi
Connection for Dress-Up Data? [0200,0000]
HGSS.593.0012:
Here, you may post the Dress-Up Data
of your Pokémon.\f
The Dress-Up Data can be set up and
saved in the Goldenrod Tunnel.\f
The Dress-Up Data posted by other
Trainers may also be viewed here.\f
The data may be sorted by Pokémon
for convenient viewing.\f
HGSS.593.0013:
Connect to Nintendo Wi-Fi
Connection for Box Data? [0200,0000]
HGSS.593.0014:
Here, you may post the Box Data
containing your Pokémon.\f
Choose a wallpaper, then place your
Pokémon on it to compose your scene.\f
When you are done, post it for other
Trainers to see.\f
The Box Data posted by other Trainers
may also be viewed here.\f
